topic.title: SQL to sequoiadb shell to C++

body.p: The query in Sequoiadb is in the format of json(bson). The following table shows examples comparing sql statements, sequoiadb shell statements and sequoiadb C++ driver application statements.

strow.stentry: select * from students where age=20 order by name
select * from students where age>20 and age<30
select count(*) from students where age>20
update students set a=a+2 where b=-1
